name: Web - HTTP Request Smuggling / Malformed Request
description: Detects HTTP request smuggling attempts and malformed HTTP requests used to bypass security controls, poison caches, or hijack other users' requests. Looks for conflicting Content-Length/Transfer-Encoding headers and oversized headers from single IPs.
search: index=web (sourcetype=nginx_access OR sourcetype=apache_access) (status=400 OR status=413 OR status=431 OR status=501) | bucket _time span=5m | stats count as bad_req_count, values(status) as status_codes, dc(uri) as unique_uris, values(method) as methods by src_ip, host, _time | where bad_req_count >= 10 | eval smuggling_indicator=case( like(mvjoin(status_codes,","), "%400%") AND bad_req_count >= 20, "Possible request smuggling - high 400s", like(mvjoin(status_codes,","), "%413%"), "Oversized payload - possible buffer overflow attempt", like(mvjoin(status_codes,","), "%431%"), "Header too large - possible header injection", like(mvjoin(status_codes,","), "%501%"), "Unknown method - method tampering", 1==1, "Malformed request pattern") | eval severity=case( bad_req_count >= 100, "high", bad_req_count >= 30, "medium", 1==1, "low") | eval mitre="T1190" | sort -bad_req_count | table _time, src_ip, host, bad_req_count, status_codes, smuggling_indicator, methods, severity, mitre
author: SOC Team
